constraints: Did not call live api.z.ai or opencode.ai

assertions.title: First-user setup journey is internally consistent

steps.action: Reviewed README.md setup journey and saved lines 115-210 snippet
steps.expected: English docs cover xai-oauth, zai-api-key, opencode-zen, opencode-go from auth/config through local proxy usage
steps.observed: README documents x.ai OAuth login, Z.AI API-key/auth-file setup, OpenCode Zen/Go openai-compatibility setup, local proxy /v1 usage, upstream-vs-local key separation, and model aliases.

steps.action: Compared README names/aliases with config.example.yaml provider snippets
steps.expected: Provider names, base URLs, config keys, and aliases line up without hidden/deleted localized doc dependency
steps.observed: README and config both use xai-oauth/grok, zai-api-key/glm-5, opencode-zen/zen-default, and opencode-go/go-default; stale localized doc grep returned none in README/docs/AGENTS.

evidence.network: No network validation was performed; commands were local/static only.

assertions.title: Z.AI and OpenCode provider boundaries remain distinct

steps.action: Inspected README/config snippets for provider families
steps.expected: Z.AI is first-class zai-api-key; OpenCode Zen/Go are openai-compatibility examples only
steps.observed: README/config show zai-api-key separately from openai-compatibility entries named opencode-zen and opencode-go.

steps.action: Ran code search for OpenCode under internal, cmd, and sdk
steps.expected: No first-class OpenCode runtime/auth/translator/registry/cmd/sdk additions for Zen/Go
steps.observed: Only generic/pre-existing OpenCode-style comments were found; no opencode-zen/go provider code or endpoint special cases.

evidence.network: No network validation was performed; commands were local/static only.

assertions.title: No live secrets are introduced or required

steps.action: Ran git status/diff checks before report generation
steps.expected: No untracked or modified credential material such as .env, config.yaml, auth files, or credential dumps
steps.observed: git status --porcelain and git diff --name-status were empty before report/evidence generation.

steps.action: Ran secret-oriented ripgrep over docs, config, source, examples, and tests
steps.expected: No private keys or real-looking API/OAuth tokens
steps.observed: No matches; examples use placeholders such as <ZAI_API_KEY> and <OPENCODE_API_KEY>.

evidence.network: No network validation was performed; commands were local/static only.

assertions.title: No live upstream validation is performed

steps.action: Reviewed validation command log and executable/static scans
steps.expected: No live api.z.ai/opencode.ai calls, no proxy startup, no Docker Compose execution, no 127.0.0.1:8318 usage
steps.observed: Validation commands were local git/rg/python/go commands only. Search found provider base URL constant and docker-build helper script strings, but no executed live upstream validation or 127.0.0.1:8318 references.

steps.expected: Tests use local/mocked validation and complete without live upstream credentials
steps.observed: go test ./... passed with no live credential setup.

evidence.network: No network validation was performed; commands were local/static only.

assertions.title: Final local validation gates pass and leave no artifacts

steps.observed: Exit code 0; all packages passed or had no test files.

steps.action: Ran go build -o test-output ./cmd/server && rm test-output, then test -e test-output
steps.expected: Build exits 0 and test-output is absent afterward
steps.observed: Build command exited 0; follow-up absence check exited 1, confirming test-output was removed.

evidence.network: No network validation was performed; commands were local/static only.

assertions.title: Docs and config examples use matching names and aliases

steps.action: Grep/read README.md and config.example.yaml for xai-oauth, zai-api-key, opencode-zen, and opencode-go
steps.expected: Matching provider names/config keys/model aliases across docs and config examples
steps.observed: Both surfaces include xai-oauth with grok alias example, zai-api-key with glm-5 alias, opencode-zen with prefix zen/alias zen-default, and opencode-go with prefix go/alias go-default.

evidence.network: No network validation was performed; commands were local/static only.

steps.action: Ran whole-file YAML parse using python3/PyYAML
Extracted and parsed commented provider example blocks
steps.expected: Commented blocks around zai-api-key, openai-compatibility OpenCode examples, and xai-oauth examples parse as YAML when uncommented
steps.observed: Five extracted blocks parsed successfully, including zai-api-key and OpenAI compatibility examples.

evidence.network: No network validation was performed; commands were local/static only.

commands.observation: Clean before writing validation report/evidence; no untracked credential artifacts.
No working-tree diff before report/evidence generation.
Found expected provider/config documentation in README.md and config.example.yaml; no stale localized doc references in checked user docs/guidance.
Only generic/pre-existing OpenCode-style comments found; no opencode-zen/go first-class provider implementation or endpoint special cases.
No executable live api.z.ai/opencode.ai validation calls and no 127.0.0.1:8318 references; Docker compose appears only in standalone docker-build helper scripts that were not run.

commands.command: rg -n "BEGIN (RSA|OPENSSH|DSA|EC|PGP) PRIVATE KEY|sk-[A-Za-z0-9]{20,}|AIza[0-9A-Za-z_-]{20,}|ghp_[0-9A-Za-z]{20,}|xox[baprs]-[0-9A-Za-z-]{10,}" README.md config.example.yaml docs internal cmd sdk examples test
commands.observation: No matches; exit 1 is expected for ripgrep when no secrets are found.

commands.command: python3 extracted commented provider blocks YAML validation
commands.observation: Extracted commented provider examples parsed: zai-api-key, OpenAI compatibility examples, and xai-oauth alias/exclusion blocks.
Server build passed and removed temporary test-output artifact.
Expected absence check: test-output does not exist after build cleanup.

summary: Tested 7 cross-area assertions: 7 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. Static/doc checks, YAML parsing, go test ./..., git diff --check, and build cleanup gate all met the validation contract.
